message:
feat: Add streaming callback API for direct Swift integration

Implement callback-based streaming for direct memory access between Zig and Swift:

**Scheduler (src/scheduler.zig)**
- Add token_callback, callback_user_data, bytes_consumed to Cell struct
- Call Swift callback from Zig thread for each new token in step()
- Send empty token (len=0) on completion to signal end

**C API (src/c_api.zig)**
- Add zell_predict_streaming() - async generation with callback
- Add zell_cancel() - cancel generation
- Add zell_start_runner() / zell_stop_runner() - background scheduler thread
- Background thread runs scheduler.step() continuously every 5ms

**Swift Bridge (app/ZellApp/Bridge/ZellBridge.swift)**
- Rewrite for callback-based streaming (no more blocking zell_predict)
- Use @convention(c) callback marshalling
- Use Unmanaged for self pointer to C
- Dispatch callbacks to main thread for UI updates
- Detect completion via empty token (tokenLen == 0)

**Headers (include/zell.h, app/ZellKit/zell.h)**
- Add zell_token_callback_t typedef
- Add streaming API function declarations

Rich Zig, thin Swift architecture:
- Zig does all heavy lifting (inference, scheduling, token generation)
- Swift is thin UI layer receiving callbacks
- Direct memory access, no HTTP, no subprocess overhead
- Model loaded once in memory for fast subsequent inferences

files.patch:
@@ -64,6 +64,34 @@ int zell_version_major(void);
 int zell_version_minor(void);
 int zell_version_patch(void);
 
+// ============================================================================
+// Streaming API (for direct Swift integration)
+// ============================================================================
+
+/// Callback function type for streaming tokens
+/// @param token Null-terminated token string
+/// @param token_len Length of token (0 signals completion)
+/// @param user_data User-provided data pointer
+typedef void (*zell_token_callback_t)(const char* token, int token_len, void* user_data);
+
+/// Start async generation with streaming callback
+/// @param prompt Input text (null-terminated)
+/// @param max_tokens Maximum tokens to generate
+/// @param callback Function to call for each new token
+/// @param user_data User data to pass to callback
+/// @return cell_id on success, negative error code on failure
+int zell_predict_streaming(const char* prompt, int max_tokens, zell_token_callback_t callback, void* user_data);
+
+/// Cancel generation for a cell
+/// @param cell_id Cell ID returned by zell_predict_streaming
+void zell_cancel(int cell_id);
+
+/// Start background scheduler thread (runs step() continuously)
+void zell_start_runner(void);
+
+/// Stop background scheduler thread
+void zell_stop_runner(void);
+
 #ifdef __cplusplus
 }
 #endif

@@ -64,6 +64,34 @@ int zell_version_major(void);
 int zell_version_minor(void);
 int zell_version_patch(void);
